sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the current state first, then click middle track's red controller and check ALL tracks
current_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Save current state for comparison
before_state = {i: current_ascii[i] for i in range(46)}

# Click middle track's red controller
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 26, 'col': 14}])

after_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== CHANGED ROWS after clicking middle track red controller ===")
changed_rows = []
for i in range(46):
    if before_state[i] != after_ascii[i]:
        changed_rows.append(i)
        if i in [17, 20, 23, 26, 29, 32, 35, 38, 41, 44]:
            print(f"Row {i}: CHANGED")
            print(f"  Before: {before_state[i][14:56]}")
            print(f"  After:  {after_ascii[i][14:56]}")

print(f"\nTotal changed rows: {len(changed_rows)}")
print(f"Changed row indices: {changed_rows}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
